title: brachycorythis conica subsp. conica
intro: Brachycorythis conica subsp. conica is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family, characterized by its slender stems and small, yellow-green flowers. It has been traditionally used in African medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly as a treatment for various respiratory issues due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to alleviate coughs, colds, and bronchitis, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, Brachycorythis conica subsp. conica is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
